intentSynonyms: get a tasks for project in asana
look up a tasks for project in asana
fetch a single tasks for project in asana
view one specific tasks for project in asana
get tasks for project in asana
list tasks in a project in asana
description: List tasks in a project. Supports pagination with limit and offset.

project_gid.description: Project GID to list tasks for

limit.description: Maximum number of tasks to return (default 20, max 100)

offset.description: Pagination offset from a previous response
